prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 12 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 61.7 kg; Height 160.3 cm; BMI 24.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 116/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.6%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 7.9%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 253mg/dL; 9 months ago 209mg/dL; 6 months ago 231mg/dL; 3 months ago 214mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 64.2kg; 9 months ago 61.1kg; 6 months ago 60.8kg; 3 months ago 62.1kg; current 61.7kg), Height (12 months ago 160.3cm; 9 months ago 160.3cm; 6 months ago 160.3cm; 3 months ago 160.3cm; current 160.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 116mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 62mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 62mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 99U/L; 9 months ago 98U/L; 6 months ago 91U/L; 3 months ago 83U/L; current 98U/L), AST (12 months ago 97U/L; 9 months ago 98U/L; 6 months ago 93U/L; 3 months ago 78U/L; current 99U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.7mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; current 55mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 299mg/g; 9 months ago 304mg/g; 6 months ago 275mg/g; 3 months ago 257mg/g; current 267mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 76mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 82mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 49mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 121mg/dL; 9 months ago 138mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 141mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
